name: Starter Reasoning
description: Template prompts for judgement, inference, and clear thinking.

prompts.title: What follows
prompts.prompt: Given these facts, what can we reasonably conclude, what is only a guess, and what would we need to know next?

prompts.title: Hidden assumption
prompts.prompt: I think this argument sounds convincing, but something feels off. Identify the hidden assumptions and which one matters most.

prompts.title: Common sense check
prompts.prompt: Give me a common-sense read on this situation without flattening it into obvious advice.

prompts.title: Competing explanations
prompts.prompt: Here are three possible explanations. Compare them and tell me which is most likely, not just that all are possible.

prompts.title: Land the conclusion
prompts.prompt: Reason through this carefully, but do not hedge forever. I want a clear conclusion if one is warranted.
